About the Builder

Generative AI Solutions Leader shaping the future of enterprise tech.

I'm Kanchana Patlolla. My work involves defining portfolio strategy for Databases and AI agents, working directly with customers to understand their needs, and driving the creation of core resources—from reference architectures to near-production functional demos.

With an engineer's foundation in databases, I bring deep technical expertise to the world of AI. I was a key leader behind the release of Open Data QnA and the Agent Development Kit for Vertex AI.

Strategic Focus

  • ✔ Innovation (Design Thinking & Use Case Prioritization)
  • ✔ AI/ML Solutions (Document AI, Vertex AI, Agent Garden)
  • ✔ Enterprise Cloud Architecture & Serverless Data

Connect

Intention

"Learning is a marathon, not a sprint. This site is my personal laboratory for navigating the ever-changing cloud race."
